Darius.trading_pattern: Darius Q bleed is oppressive. Your E engage and tankiness help. Trade with E engage.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: His Q outer ring bleed — walk at him to avoid. Your tankiness absorbs damage.
Darius.early_game: Darius dominates early. Use E to engage carefully. Don't extend far.
Darius.mid_game: Your tankiness scales. His ult is deadly — avoid low HP.
Darius.late_game: You outscale through tankiness and teamfight CC. He struggles vs grouped.
Darius.win_condition: Use E wisely to engage. Scale into tankiness. Group for fights.
Darius.scaling: You outscale through tankiness and CC.
Darius.positioning: Use E to engage. Teamfight grouped. Avoid extended.

Garen.trading_pattern: Garen Q silence dominates close. Your E engage and tankiness help. Use E wisely.
Garen.ability_to_dodge: His Q silence wind-up — move away. Your tankiness helps survive.
Garen.early_game: Garen dominates early. Use E to engage or disengage. Play around it.
Garen.mid_game: Both scale into tankiness. Trade carefully around cooldowns.
Garen.win_condition: Use E wisely. Trade around cooldowns. Group for fights.
Garen.positioning: Use E wisely. Teamfight grouped. Respect tankiness.

Fiora.trading_pattern: Fiora's parry negates your damage. Your E engage helps but risky. Play carefully.
Fiora.ability_to_dodge: Her parry W — don't trade into her. Use E to engage at range.
Fiora.early_game: Fiora dominates early. Use E defensively. Don't trade into parry.
Fiora.mid_game: Your tankiness scales. Her split push is strong. Group for fights.
Fiora.late_game: You outscale through tankiness. Fiora struggles vs grouped.
Fiora.win_condition: Use E defensively. Avoid parry. Group for teamfights.
Fiora.positioning: Use E defensively. Avoid parry. Group for fights.

Jax.trading_pattern: Jax's dueling and E stun are oppressive. Your E engage is risky into E. Play safe.
Jax.ability_to_dodge: His E stun counter — don't use E into him carelessly.
Jax.early_game: Jax dominates early. Use E defensively. Don't trade.
Jax.mid_game: Your tankiness scales. His dueling is still strong. Group for fights.
Jax.late_game: You outscale through tankiness. Jax struggles vs grouped.
Jax.win_condition: Use E defensively. Avoid trading. Group for teamfights.
Jax.positioning: Use E defensively. Avoid E range. Group for fights.

Riven.trading_pattern: Riven's combo is fast and oppressive. Your E engage and tankiness help. Play safe.
Riven.ability_to_dodge: Her Q dash combo — use E defensively to kite away.
Riven.early_game: Riven's burst dominates. Use E defensively. Don't trade.
Riven.mid_game: Your tankiness scales. Her split push is strong. Group for fights.
Riven.late_game: You outscale through tankiness. Riven struggles grouped.
Riven.win_condition: Use E defensively. Avoid her. Group for teamfights.
Riven.positioning: Use E defensively. Avoid combo. Group for fights.

Aatrox.mid_game: Your tankiness scales. His all-in is still strong. Group for fights.
Aatrox.late_game: You outscale through tankiness. He falls off.

Nasus.trading_pattern: Nasus has zero early game. Your E engage and tankiness dominate. Engage freely.
Nasus.ability_to_dodge: His W wither — use E to engage and tank. Your tankiness is stronger.
Nasus.early_game: Dominate with E engage. Nasus is helpless. Build a lead.
Nasus.mid_game: Your lead carries. His stacking helps. Group for fights.
Nasus.late_game: His stacks scale. You outscale through tankiness. Group always.
Nasus.win_condition: Dominate early with E. Build lead. Group for fights.
Nasus.scaling: He outscales through stacks — you through tankiness.
Nasus.positioning: Engage aggressively early. Group for fights. Teamfight.

Malphite.positioning: Use E wisely. Trade gradually. Teamfight grouped.

Kayle.mid_game: Her range extends. Your tankiness scales. Group for fights.
Kayle.late_game: She scales well. You outscale through CC. Group always.
